data: Threats seem like a ridiculous farce.
Subject gains a bonus on Perception checks.
Tread unsteadily on air, with limitations.
Gain a +10 ft. bonus to speed and a +1 dodge bonus to AC
Gain haste while maintaining bardic performance.
Summon a duplicate of yourself from a parallel world to aid another
Gain bonuses when you're interacting with animals
Assume form of a Small or Medium humanoid.
Swap one summoned creature with another.
Contact the spirits of your ancestors to bolster your own knowledge.
Sends a Tiny animal to a specific place.
Animal gains a new general purpose.
Creatures forget details about you and conversations with you.
Gain increasing bonuses to AC and on attack rolls and damage rolls against one creature.
Impede the use of summon spells.
Send or receive a small object via teleportation.
Grant the trapfinding ability or a +5 Disable Device bonus.
Make it difficult for others to cast arcane spells.
Cause the target to avoid an object or location.
Target becomes nauseated and causes nearby creatures to become fascinated.
Cursed object highlights creatures that attempt to take it.
Gain an innate sense of the direction to your home or last-used crafting area.
Grant the target a bonus on a skill check and consider them trained.
Enchanted skirt slows your fall and allows you to hover
+1-3 luck bonus to CMD and saves vs. spells/traps that would impede your movement; can end the spell early to gain a boost to speed.
Make an Intimidate check against all foes within 30 feet; those demoralized also take fire damage.
Learn about a creature with its blood.
Inspire a number of creatures into a rage, increaing their strength but lowering their AC.
Attacks miss subject 20% of the time.
Change one creature to look and act like another.
Targets take fire damage; orcs get +2 Strength.
Protect a book from fire, acid, and water.
Gain various bonuses when interacting with the target.
Make a willing target appear to be dead.
Subject gains +4 to Dex for 1 min./level.
Infuse a weapon with just enough energy to negate regeneration.
Compel a creature to aid others rather than use violence.
Speak, read, and Write a new code language.
Ask a question to all birds within a mile of your location.
Target is compelled to help injured ally.
Provide another spell whose effects reverse if the target breaks a restriction.
Duplicate a drug's effects on others.
Grant bonuses and temporary hit points that spread from creature to creature.
Cause two creatures to automatically fail to confirm critical hits
Target is compelled to steal valuable objects
Creates treasure map out of a creature's corpse.
Living creature of 6 HD or less loses next action.
Blame someone else for your actions.
Stops poison from harming target for 1 hour/level.
Make a creature give you an object it's holding.
As detect magic, but learn more information.
Detect whether or not creatures are related by blood.
Determine the exact thickness of a wall, ceiling, or other barrier.
Weaken a creature's resistance to one type of energy
Reduce the areas of divination spells for the purpose of targeting you
Object touched emanates bright light, granting Perception and Sense Motive bonuses.
As disguise self, but affects you or another.
Create an illusion to repulse a vampire.
Disrupt all silence effects in an area.
Noise makes it difficult to cast.
Magical rain dampens fire but amplfies electricity
Emulate the vocal inflections of dragons.
Ward a target's mind to protect them while unconscious.
Spew a noxious cloud in a 30 ft. cone.
Black particles extinguish light sources within area.
Subject gains +4 to Cha for 1 min./level.
Empower holy water to deal more damage to the undead.
See enchantment spells active on creatures
Ward yourself against thought detection and memory alteration.
Transfers your consciousness to an object bearing your likeness.
As alarm, but alerts you when a creatuer leaves the area
Gain maneuverability by avoiding the attacks of larger creatures.
Alter creature's buoyancy so that it swiftly rises to the surface
Change to become one age category younger or older
Cause a single object to become broken. Can also disrupt a construct's animating force.
Alter your appearance to appear living.
Create an area of inconsistent lighting.
Gain skill bonuses when interacting with the target.
Gain a glimpse of the future
Subject gains +4 to Int for 1 min./level.
Divide a consumable alchemical item into two nearly identical copies.
+2d4 bonus on failed attack roll or skill check.
Plant a seed of doubt in the target, causing self-doubt.
Incorporeal creature takes half damage from nonmagical weapons.
You look like a ghost of yourself.
Cause an object to briefly transform into gold.
Creatures are shaken and take Wis damage.
Shift the target's attitude one step more hostile towards you and everyone else nearby. This also penalizes his attacks, saves, and certain skill checks.
Each ally in area gains a +10 bonus on one Reflex save.
Gives +2 on attack rolls, saves, skill checks.
Remove one piece of information from your memory and turn it into a magical tattoo
Prevent creatures from noticing your presence.
Gain +10 on Bluff to send secret messages.
Roll 2 dice when using Diplomacy, take higher roll.
Distort all of the targets senses
Grant target a +2 enhancement bonus to an ability score.
Make targets become deathly afraid of water.
As per detect magic, except affecting a creature you touch
Transform the target into a half-elf form.
Create an illusion of an ever-changing maze of glass.
Interfere with the target's ability to speak.
Stabilize an area of primal magic
Summon a melee weapon to wield.
Roll twice and take the higher roll when using certain mental skills.
Subject is invisible for 1 min./level or until it attacks.
As invisibility, but altered to work better underwater
Fill the target with a sense of entitled self-importance.
Any coin a creature touches turns into a copper piece
Wrap the target in a mantle of summery air; this also harms creatures with the cold subtype.
Delay a poison's onset and hide its presence.
Instantly learn about the geography of the surrounding area.
Alter a creature's buoyancy so that it plummits to the depths
Surround a creature with a light prison, damaging and blinding it if it attempts to escape.
Senses direction toward object (specific or type).
Target takes penalties to mental actions.
Allies can hustle without penalty while you sing or chant.
Make a normal item into a masterwork one.
Cause two creatures to fall in love.
Use the Path of Numbers to place a mathematical curse on someone.
Prevent the target from using its skill ranks, spells, feats, and abilities.
Spew a cloud of sickly green mist to demoralize all it contacts.
Target gains a message that can be given only to its intended recipient.
As silent image, plus some sound.
Creates decoy duplicates of you (1d4 + 1 per three levels, max 8).
Misleads divinations for one creature or object.
Opponents cannot attack a pathetic creature.
Frighten creature with an existential crisis
Allies gain a bonus on Stealth checks but risk verbal spell failure.
Distract and fatigue the target with a creature from its nightmares.
Make it permanently easier to learn more about a target.
Target creature gains the ferocity ability
Fill an empty book with knowledge on a topic from around the world.
damage creature who recognize an illusion for what it is
Target becomes hostile to all creatures.
Create an expanding glow that heals allies within it of 1 hp of damage.
Conceal the alignment of creatures from divination magic.
Grant tactical knowledge to your allies, increasing their AC and Reflex saves.
Target is staggered by a painful sound.
You may seize an object or manipulate it from afar.
Project a current image of the nighty sky in places you would normally be unable to view it.
Read surface thoughts to learn information about a subject.
Force the unluck effect of a pugwampi onto an unwilling creature.
Target forgets how to use commonly used objects.
Turns fire into blinding light or choking smoke.
Target gains penalties on ability checks, skill checks, and concentration checks until it spends an entire round doing nothing.
Use change shape as a swift action and surprise foes.
Gives +2 to Str and Con, +1 on Will saves, -2 to AC.
Cloak yourself in an illusion of authority.
Restore charges to a technological item.
Target is compelled to stay near another.
Create a loud clangor that causes metallic objects to vibrate wildly.
Call a small item into your hand from anywhere.
Grants a weapon the returning special weapon quality.
Reveal the true form of a magically disguised/transformed creature.
Gain great insight into the inner workings of a puzzle, device, or trap.
Follow a rumor to see where it spreads.
Bestow upon a creature one of the seven runes of rule
Panics creatures of less than 6 HD.
Shadows search for a creature or object in range
Gain a bonus on Charisma-based skills towards those who find you attractive.
Gain the ability to sneak attack.
Tether a creature to its shadow, preventing it from moving too far.
Claws of shadow deal slashing damage and Strength damage
Imbue targets with a fraction of your mythic nature.
As share language, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Share one memory with the target.
Share your teamwork feats with allies
Sonic vibration damages objects or crystalline creatures.
Make a target sound as if elsewhere.
Give yourself privacy by muffling sound leaving the area.
Use a scarf as a shield or whip.
Draw out a creatures inner sin
Increase the DC of Climb checks in the area
Create a cone of damaging sound at will.
Deals 1d8 sonic damage and may stun subjects.
Discover some spells the target has prepared.
Steal the breath from a creature's lungs.
Compels subject to follow stated course of action.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Summons swarm of bats, rats, or spiders.
Either grant a bonus to saves against, or suppress, charm and compulsion spells
Attempt to magically wrest an item from the target.
As magic aura, but affects all similar objects in a 5-foot radius
You gain an additional +1 on attack rolls or to AC due to battlefield positioning.
Prevent a creature from making attacks of opportunity.
Mix a potion that creates a magical chest tattoo when drunk.
Create an invisible psychic interference that inhibits telepathic communication.
Ammunition in the targeted firearm deafens opponents.
Distract a target with lustful thoughts
Change the damage a creature can deal from lethal to nonlethal.
Use a piece of a ship to track it on a nautical chart.
Cause a rose to leave a scented trail along your path as you move.
Create a shadowy afterimage that can damage enemies if the initial attack misses.
Target is compelled to avoid another creature.
Step into one doorway and out another.
Grant ability to speak, read, and write one or more languages for 8 hours.
Create a whip made of poisonous spiders.
Transfer the effects of afflictions from someone else to yourself.
As disguise self, but you can change the disguise as a swift action.
Creatures believe you are their direct superior.
Make 1 knowledge check /3 levels with a +10 bonus
Enchanted cloak grants shield bonus to AC and can use aid another on you once per round
Shroud creatures in an aura of suspicion and paranoia.
Use a creature's corpse to adopt its form
Create a phantasm with auditory and visual effects.
Make actions seem mundane to nearby creatures.
Send out a burst of luck to allies around you.
Affected creatures don't count as allies for any purpose
Gain a pool of luck that can be used to add a luck bonus to any d20 rolls, which can turn a failure into a success
You randomly vanish and reappear for 1 round per level.
Destroy all writing within an area.
(Downtime Spell) Promote your business with magic and increase the amount of activity it receives.
Cause the target's attacks to gain a miss chance.
Creates a shelter around a campfire.
Prevent others from interfering in a duel.
Fuel a target's spellcasting, spontaneously cast spells without expending the slot.
Makes monster believe it is your ally.
Hear or see at a distance for 1 min./level.
Apply a metamagic property to an ally's spell.
Set the condition for triggering a target's readied standard, move, or swift action.
Direct a summoned monster as if you had summoned it.
Subjects take -2 on attack rolls, damage rolls, saves, and checks.
Target is sickened while viewing trigger.
Target gains dodge bonus to AC against larger creatures.
Puts 10 HD of creatures to sleep.
Animate a glove or gauntlet from a distance.
As delay poison, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Send messages as per message with a suggestion for one creature.
Learn what makes a creautre anxious.
Quickly analyze the monetary value of objects and identify which are most valuable.
Dissipate the charges from a technical object or hamper a creature with the robot subtype.
Cancels one magical spell or effect.
Attacks miss subject 50% of the time.
Sever the target's link with her bonded creature.
Read thought echoes of a creature mentally controlling another.
Cause living creatures to lose their immunity to fear or mind-affecting effects vs your spells.
Surroundings and unfamiliar creatures seem like something out of a nightmare.
Enables you to speak to elementals and some creatures.
Force a creature to protect and care for you.
Instrument maintains bardic performance for you.
Modify the target's memory in a specific way.
Cause divinations of the future to reveal the result you choose.
You panic creatures caught in a 30ft cone of terror.
Create a menacing duplicate of yourself to interact with others.
As feather step, but affects many targets rather than one.
Targets gain a moral bonus to Strength, Constitution, and Will, as well as the rend ability with claws or unarmed strikes
Learn many of the target's weaknesses and gain a +5 bonus on your next attack.
Create a gap in the target's memory.
Swap one rage power for another.
Heal yourself with the next spell that also deals damage.
Gain the effects of freedom of movement, but also become drunk
As freedom of movement, but only allowing a creature to move freely underwater
Subject becomes insubstantial and can fly slowly.
Commands subject of 7 HD or less.
Leave a message hidden on a surface
You gain +20 bonus on Bluff checks, and your lies can escape magical discernment.
Subjects gain +2 on attack rolls, damage rolls, saves, and checks.
Bless a monument to imbue nearby humans with 2/magic damage reduction.
Gain a +4 insight bonus on saving throws vs a creature's abilitiy you have identified with a Knowledge check
Target takes a -10 penalty to Sense Motive and creatures using Bluff against them gain a +10 bonus on such checks
Change the appearance of a structure to suit your tastes
Use a Harrow deck to predict the future.
One creature/level moves faster, receives +1 on attack rolls, AC, and Reflex saves.
Spirits cause wracking pain to listeners.
Provide a heroism effect that you can reverse at any time
Cause creatures to gain a phobia
Rapidly recall everything you know about a subject.
Only select creatures can read text.
Assume the form of a native outsider
Create illusory pillars that block movement
Humanoid becomes friendly to all other creatures.
As invisibility bubble, but capable of affecting larger creatures
Make a creature invisible and silent to their allies.
Teleport target within 30 ft. of itself.
Call for a leshy swarm to aid you.
Transmute an object into a liquid version of itself.
Inspire yourself or a lover into a rage against someone who wronged you.
Summon a swarm of mischievous monkeys.
As magic aura, but also affects creatures and allows more options.
As silent image, plus sound, smell, and thermal effects.
Target is compelled to plot against another.
Take partial control of an opponent's limbs.
Determine if two things are identical.
Target must act as though they are wandering through a maze.
As the dream spell, except delivering a shorter message.
Create up to four motes that shed light or darkness.
Cause splitting headaches and an oversensitivity to light and darkness.
Create a seductive song to lure all nearby creatures.
Enhance your ability to seem small and unimportant, increasing your Stealth.
Grieving target can take no actions and is denied its Dex bonus.
Mask your features with shadowy illumination.
Fey forces target enemies with random combat maneuvers
Conjures a phantom to drive vehicles.
As per dimension door, but with more restrictions and affecting a creature you touch
Allow the target's tail to make Dirty Trick or Steal maneuvers.
Find answers to Knowledge questions by looking at alternate realities.
(Downtime Spell) Increase the appeal a targeted room has.
Animate an area of rocks to create a dangerous, rolling area of debris.
Enhance an object to function as if it were masterwork quality.
Summon a swarm of poisonous frogs.
Quickly turn into a tiny blurred shape with flight.
Frees object or person from curse.
Foul liquid nauseates creatures that bite the target
Render all targets silent, but only one-way.
Transfer some of your mythic essence to another creature.
As returning weapon, but you may divide the duration among weapons touched.
Create a model of the surrounding land and the creatures nearby
Spies on subject from a distance.
Creates new sounds or changes existing ones into new sounds.
Changes one page to hide its real content.
Weaken a creature to your divinations and enchantments
As alarm, but only against selected creatures.
Allow one creature to see you while invisible.
Creates a snake-shaped text symbol that immobilizes reader.
Erase a creature's memory about a single topic.
Use material from the Shadow Plane to create an illusory version of an enchantment spell.
Obscure the appearance of all creatures within the shifting shadows.
Illusory silt hides creatures while underwater
Create a bright silver light that is harmful to those vulnerable to silver.
Unobstructed view of the sky from underground
One subject/level takes only one action/round, -1 to AC, Reflex saves, and attack rolls.
Target is distracted by its sense of self.
Summon a spectral animal to scout for you.
Create a mobile area of bright light while also suppressing light surrounding it.
Give the target a -4 penalty on ability checks, skill checks, and any checks requiring concentration.
Conjure your ancestors' spirits to help you in combat.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Creature is compelled to harm itself.
Convince target that a nearby creature knows her greatest secret.
When rolling a d20, roll 3d20 and choose the middle result
As tongues, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Swap a focus object with a target object.
As suggestion, but triggered only and target doesn't remember the suggestion.
Protective barrier of force knocks creatures and deals force damage
Entwine your words with poison, harming the target if they share your message.
Creatures that pass through the wall are nauseated and might fall prone.
Create a wall of illumination, darkness on one side, light on the other.
See through the target's eyes and ears.
Absorb a magic rune up to 3rd level, which can be moved or dispelled
As alter self, but you can change the shape as a swift action.
Target loses most of its memories
Summon an ancestor to bring you a ghostly, magical weapon.
Grant an animal messenger sentience to deliver your message.
Constrain the target so they cannot make attack rolls against anyone except those of the opposite alignment.
Cause a creature to lose interest in its passions
Take control over a construct, forcing it to regard you as its master.
As ally across time, but more cubes and more duplicates
Merge a melee weapon with a rod or staff.
Use a likeness to adopt a dead creature's form
Sacrifice your own blood to imbue others with spell-like abilities.
Create a luxurious feast for two creatures/level.
Frees subjects from enchantments, transmutations, and curses.
As charm person, but affects multiple creatures within 30 ft.
As compel tongue, except it affects multiple creatures.
Create a phantasm with effects for all senses.
Cast a suggestion that gets passed on to secondary targets
Transfer a scroll's power to the target; the scroll is then triggered as contingency.
As whispering wind, except it can carry responses and multiple messages.
Create a nonmagical weapon, shield, or set of armor.
As daze, but affecting multiple creatures.
Set one of a list of contingencies for your demise.
Make someone seem like an obvious liar.
3d6 sonic damage in 10-ft. burst or 30-ft. cone can also bull rush creatures.
Receive a clear and memorable view of the layout of the nearby area.
Sonic sense gives you blindsight 40 ft.
Entice service from a fey with 6 Hit Dice or fewer.
Targets steal from or disarm others.
Targets are panicked, and you gain temporary hit points.
Charge, then teleport back to starting poisiton
Learn if an action you are about to take would be too difficult; choose an alternate path if it is.
As deep slumber, but only on one creature. This also causes them to lose some memories.
Subject moves normally despite impediments to restrict movement.
Allow an item to transform into a brand and back.
As ghostbane dirge, but affects multiple creatures.
Grant target a +4 competence bonus on any attack, caster level check, saving throw, or skill check (can be used multiple times at higher levels).
Makes one type of terrain appear like another (field as forest, or the like).
Sift through a creatures memories and make Knowledge checks with their modifier
Subject within range of your bardic performance can take an action.
As heroic fortune, but with multiple people.
As hold person, but any creature.
As hypnotism affecting more creatures and involving more requests
Force the target to believe nothing in its hoard is missing or disturbed.
Create insects to scout an area for you.
As invisibility, but subject can attack and stay invisible.
Imbue a creature with raw energy from the First World.
Lets you learn tales about a person, place, or thing.
Temporarily transfer one of your mythic path abilities to another creature.
Enchant an area to confuse those who travel within it.
As enter image, but also gain bonuses on social skills while in the image.
Curse a creature's shadow to disrupt their actions
Immunizes subject against poison, detoxifies venom in or on subject.
As oneiric horror, plus Str damage.
Control the topic of conversation among a group of people.
Create an expanding glow that heals allies within it of 5 hp of damage.
Force a creature to see the negative side of things.
Creature re-lives an injury, taking 1d6 damage/level
As phantom steed, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.
Free yourself from enchantments and paralysis effects.
Turn an ioun stone into a scrying sensor.
Weapons make no sound and quiet their victims.
Stain the hand of a creature's killer red.
Remove radiation effects from a target.
Insects, spiders, and other vermin stay 10 ft. away.
Curse a magic item, weakening it and causing its magical qualities to fail half of the time.
Create a wall that fascinates creatures that attempt to move through it
Weak creatures are compelled to seek shelter
Peaceful feelings harm those attempting violence.
Mimics conjuration below 4th level, but only 20% real.
Shroud yourself in a shadowy illusion of a dragon.
Teleport, leaving an illusion of yourself in the space you left
Create a shadowy aura of doubt fueled by a foe's own inner flaws.
Teleport from one shadow to another.
Replace the target's body with mystic shadow material, causing them to take less damage from attacks.
Create a protective shield of sunlight.
As mirror image, but the duplicates emit electrical damage when destroyed.
Deafens all within cone and deals 5d6 sonic damage.
Enhance your bardic performance to grant fast healing to three creatures.
Sound moves targets away from you.
You can talk to plants and plant creatures.
Summon an accuser devil to do your bidding.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Conjure a ship out of extradimensional materials
Communicate with any creature with a mind.
Create a number of invisible crew members to work on a ship.
Treat penalties from emotion effects as bonuses instead
Target's attitude worsens by two categories.
Plant a scrying sensor that you can use to spy on a creature, object, or location.
Cause a sleeping creature to retain some perception of its surroundings
Start a second bardic performance while maintaining the first.
Translucent wall blinds or deafens creatures that pass through it.
Sonic wall deflects and damages creatures.
Outlines subject and produces light as a sunrod.
Paralyze all creatures in the area with the sound of a booming trumpet.
Creates a safe house for air-breathing creatures underwater
You and allies escape an emergency by teleporting to safety.
Curse a creature to weaken the DCs of its abilities and deal minimum damage with its attacks
As Bladed Dash, except allowing you to make an attack against every creature you pass through during the dash.
Turn a creautre into a mask, which can be used to take on its appearence
Causes living creatures within 5 ft. to fall asleep.
Shadows protect you from bright light and grants defensive abilities
Quckly search though a collection of texts to find the right information
Curse someone to rub people the wrong way.
Blast of song deals 3d10 damage and deafens targets.
Take control of a creature's mind and implant deadly subconscious commands.
Protect your magic from attempts to dispel it
Works as dispel magic, but can affect multiple targets.
Cause a creature to think it is dreaming
Summon a shadowy version of a legendary character.
Teleport the target a short distance while freeing them from restraints.
Paralyzes creatures listening to your song.
As grease, but with a greater area and/or targets
As lesser guardian monument, except with DR 4/magic.
As harrowing, except affect an entire group of creatures and allow them some measure of control over their destiny.
Gives +4 bonus on attack rolls, saves, skill checks; immunity to fear; temporary hp.
As touch of mercy, except affecting an area.
As inveigle person, but affects any living creature
Target takes 1d6 sonic/level and is stunned.
Send a message to creatures within miles.
Subjects in fog get -10 to Wis and Will checks.
Turns you invisible and creates illusory double.
Amplify music of the spheres to grant fast healing, resistance, and saving throw bonuses to all creatures in the area.
As mydriatic spontaneity, except it can affect multiple creatures.
As major image, but no concentration required.
Induce an irrational fear in a creature to the point of madness.
Curse a creature to attract nasty rumors.
(Downtime Spell) Rearrange and resize rooms in a building you constructed.
Remove a piece of knowledge from your mind.
Target is damaged, staggered, and stunned.
As confusion, but only affects constructs.
As complex hallucination, but without concentration.
As seeds of influence, but have a chance to dispel protective magic before it takes effect
Changes appearance of one person per two levels.
Conjure protective wisps of darkness made from shadow.
Mimics evocation of lower than 5th level, but only 20% real.
Step into shadow to travel rapidly.
Shadowy duplicate starts a bardic performance.
Affected creatures have their vision impaired
Forces targets to attack each other.
Swap your soul with your familiar's.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Amplify the mythic powers of the target creatures, bolstering them with healing energy.
Grant benefits on future attempts after failed checks, and protect against fear and emotion effects.
Target is compelled to destroy one enemy.
Make an area seem worthless to others.
Wall of energy that only blocks and affects evil creatures and spells
Create a whip made of poisonous centipedes.
As absorb rune I, but affecting a rune up to 5th level
Temporarily suppress the most powerful qualities of a magical item.
Mutate someone's shadow and trick the creature into believing they've transformed.
Take extra swift actions at the cost of Con damage.
Take best of two d20 rolls.
As charm monster, but all within 30 ft.
Excise memories involving a single creature from others.
As dance of a hundred cuts, plus the benefits of haste.
Send messages as per message with one suggestion for each creature.
Call forth spectral Hellknights to trample targets in your path
As discharge, but with greater effects that can effect an area.
Entice service from a fey with 12 Hit Dice or fewer.
Target becomes panicked, sickened, and/or comatose.
As false vision, but moves with the target.
Create a portal that allows travel to the First World
Shows most direct way to a location.
As fleeting memory, except that it affects multiple creatures.
Confuses enemies who come within a magical emanation centered on you.
As lesser geas, but affects any creature.
Teleports you and select creatures to predetermined location.
Food for one creature/level cures and grants combat bonuses.
Provide a greater heroism effect that you can reverse at any time
Grant multiple creatures a +2 enhancement bonus to any ability score.
Prevent all nearby creatures from attacking others.
Target can use stealth to hide from blindsight and blindsense as well as divination magic
Permanently turn someone into a crazed criminal.
Target cannot leave a lasting impression on other creatures
Touched object deals increasing sonic damage each round.
As neutralize poison, but with an automatic success on all caster level checks to neutralize poisons.
Disturb a creature's rest with dark dreams
Creatures bow before you as if you were divine.

This spell functions like silent image, except that the figment includes visual, auditory, olfactory, and thermal elements, and the spell is permanent. By concentrating, you can move the image within the limits of the range, but it is static while you are not concentrating.
Compel similar creatures to follow you.
As major image, plus triggered by event.
Illusory double can talk and cast spells.
Learn information to aid you in assassinating a creature
As scrying, but faster and longer.
As shadow enchantment, except with higher level enchantments.
Alter a creature's body with energy from the Shadow Plane, altering its form to match a shadow creature.
Devastating yell deals 10d6 sonic damage; stuns creatures.
As song of discord, except creatures always attack others and get a bonus to Strength
Turn yourself into a creature of semi-solid sound.
Convince yourself that something is an illusion, granting you the ability to ignore its actual presence.
Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.
Conjure a symbol that makes all who see it lust for each other.

Plant a subconscious directive in the target's mind.
Changes appearance of group of creatures.
Infect others with Xhamen-Dor's seeded infestation.
Create a whip made of army ants.
Use this symbol to subject all who view it to the will of Hastur.
Inscribes a personal rune on an object or creature (visible or invisible).
Cause a stabilized creature to resume dying.
Change the color of your skin to something else.
Humanoid creature of 4 HD or less loses next action.
As detect evil, except this specifically detects outsiders with the evil subtype and their servants.
Detects spells and magic items within 60 ft.
Detects poison in one creature or object.
[Rare] Soak the target creature or object.
Dazzles one creature (-1 on attack rolls).
Retry a Climb check as an immediate action
You surround yourself with disturbing illusions.
[Rare] Deal 1d3 electricity with a ranged touch attack.
Makes minor repairs on an object.
Cloak yourself in an illusion that hides your true identity
Opens or closes small or light things.
[Rare] Bolster the subject's CMD vs. trips and Acrobatics checks to remain standing.
[Rare] Use a small vessel of force to scoop up liquid or small objects.
Imbue a quill to rapidly transcribe words from one page to another.
Use your dry, rasping whisper to fill a creature with dread.
Make a single container appear empty.
You can move slowly and safely and still cast spells, until you move quickly, make an attack, or cast a harmful spell.
Spit a tanglefoot bag at a creature.
Creates a small pocket of air around your head or an object.
Transform an alchemical item or firearm into another similar item.
Make one instrument sound like a different kind of instrument.
Makes a rope move at your command.
Triples carrying capacity of a creature.
Target gains a bonus on one initiative check.
